description_long: This object is a large, multi-level wooden structure featuring a staircase with landings and railings. The main material appears to be light-colored wood, with vertical white balusters and wooden handrails. The staircase is enclosed by partial walls on two sides, and the landings are supported by thick, flat platforms. The design is open, with visible treads and risers, and the structure is anchored to a wooden floor base. The overall appearance is robust and architectural, resembling a stairwell section from a modern building.
description: A large, multi-level wooden staircase with landings, railings, and partial wall enclosures. The structure is open and robust, with light wood and white balusters.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase ascending from the lower floor to the upper landing, with railings and partial walls visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the landings and the full run of the staircase, with the wooden floor and railings clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the staircase through a semi-transparent wall, with the curve of the stairs and the upper landing visible.
description_view_3: Narrow side view emphasizing the verticality of the structure and the thickness of the platforms and walls.
